changelog:
Code review fixes (focused, no over-engineering).

Fixed in A15:
- Critical wiring gap in validateApiKey: the legacy single-key fast-path (introduced pre-A7) was returning true without stashing the matched key in the request context. After A12 migrated the legacy key into APIKeys[0], the fast-path was making legacy-key requests bypass per-key statistics tracking entirely. Removed the fast-path; the multi-key loop now handles every authenticated request and the migrated legacy entry gets the same per-key tracking as new keys.
- Datetime-local roundtrip bug in the API Keys edit dialog: toISOString() returns UTC time but <input type="datetime-local"> expects local time. Editing an absolute-expiry value would drift it by the user's timezone offset on every save. Fixed by formatting the field as local-time ISO directly.

Not changed (intentional, per 'no over-engineering'):
- proxy/modelstats.go remains. recordModelUsage is still wired into all 7 success paths and resetModelStats is still wired into /admin/api/stats/reset. The in-memory map is technically dead since A14 reads modelstats from SQLite, but the file is small and the calls are no-ops on the read path. Removal can wait until a real cleanup pass is needed.
- 'Reset Stats' button is now a no-op for historical totals (SQLite kept forever, by design). Document this if it surprises anyone.

A14: persistent SQLite statistics (kept forever).
A13: highly customizable api keys.
A12: unify api keys (legacy auto-migrates).
A11: WebSocket transport for /v1/responses.
A10: dashboard API Keys + Analytics tabs.
A9: entrypoint chown + su-exec hotfix.
A8: dashboard credits use account-true quotaUsed.
A7: backend multi API keys.
A6: security + reliability hardening.
